subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'r-Rahím! Beseech thou the True One, exalted be His glory, that He may awaken the heedless ones of that land through the ocean of His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الرحیم از حق جل جلاله بطلب غافلان آن ارض را آگاه نماید و از بحر عنایتش
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @fairmindedness; personal justice [insaf]
